job_id.description: Identifier for the anomaly detection job.

snapshot_id.description: A numerical character string that uniquely identifies the model snapshot. You can get information for multiple snapshots by using a comma-separated list or a wildcard expression. You can get all snapshots by using `_all`, by specifying `*` as the snapshot ID, or by omitting the snapshot ID.

from.description: Skips the specified number of snapshots.

size.description: Specifies the maximum number of snapshots to obtain.

desc.description: Refer to the description for the `desc` query parameter.

end.description: Refer to the description for the `end` query parameter.

sort.description: Refer to the description for the `sort` query parameter.

start.description: Refer to the description for the `start` query parameter.

from.description: Skips the specified number of items.

size.description: Specifies the maximum number of items to obtain.
